items.name: Oceana Helmet
items.description:
How to obtain this artifact

The word/concept “Valkyrie” comes from Norse mythology, where Valkyries were warrior maidens serving Odin who chose which warriors would die in battle and be taken to Valhalla. So the idea of a Valkyrie helmet (winged or ornate battle headgear) is public domain nobody, including Roblox, can own mythology.

items.name: UNIT 019 "Mark of Endurance" Ballistic Helmet
items.description:
A ballistic helmet taken from the body of a fallen corporate operative, refurbished, repurposed, and given a battle-hardened flair to distinguish it from its corporate origins. A testament to blood shed and faith held... for a tomorrow without tears.
